messages.content: yo whos on
just got back from the hawks game lol im in
hawks win?
barely lol celtics choked in the 4th
nice. loading up now
ranked or nah
ranked lets go
im so tilted from earlier tho
when are u not tilted
lmaooo
whatever lets go
gg
clean game
frost u gotta stop pushing alone
i had it
u did not have it 😂
another?
yea
im lagging hold on
hurry up
ok go
LETS GOOOO
that was insane
ez
one more?
last one i gotta work tmrw
gg night everyone
night ✌️
lobby up
gimme 5 putting mias stuff away
ok im on
finally
we need a 4th frost is useless
wow
lmaooo hes not wrong
loadin in
wait is this the new map
ya dropped yesterday
its so good
ok that was fun ngl
told u
go again?
always
frost ur mic is echoing
fixed?
ya
GG
frost actually popped off
SEE
ok that was nasty lol
one more then im out
same
that was rough
we got rolled
i blame lag
sure rachel. lag.
rematch?
u said one more
ok actually leaving now night
night nova
im out too gn
night yall
hey so mias dentist appt is tmrw morning
Oh that's right! What time honey?
9am
ill swing by and grab her around 830 if thats ok
Of course sweetheart. I'll have her up and ready. She ate all her green beans tonight!
omg really?? shes been refusing them at home
Grandma magic 😊
lol ok well thats great
oh also should i ask about fluoride treatments
Definitely. Brooklyn's mama told me she gets them and the dentist said it really helps at this age. Can't hurt to ask.
ok cool ill bring it up
Ask about flossing too. She should be getting used to it.
mom shes 4 lol
Which is exactly when they should start! I'm not trying to nag but her teeth are important honey.
haha ok ok ill ask about everything
Good. She's playing with her blocks right now. I'll make sure she brushes before bed. Love you sweetheart ❤️
love u too tell her mama says goodnight 💕
no cavities! dr said shes doing great 😁
Oh wonderful!! That's my girl. Did you ask about the fluoride?
ya they actually did a fluoride treatment today
Oh good! And flossing?
they said she can start with the front teeth
See! I told you to ask. Good job mama.
lol ur always right
Of course I am 😊 Give my little bug a hug from me. Love you ❤️
dropping her off at daycare now. love u
taking kiwi to the vet today lol wish me luck
Oh lord. Is she going to behave?
absolutely not 😂
Good luck honey. Let me know how it goes ❤️
she was so mad lol
Oh that face! She looks like she's plotting her revenge.
she literally tried to bite dr chen
That bird is something else 😂
the vet tech was dying
said shes the feistiest parakeet theyve had in a while
I believe it! Is she okay though? Everything check out?
ya shes totally fine. healthy weight good feathers all that
dr chen said shes in great shape
Oh good. That's a relief. She's such a special little thing ❤️
she really is lol
mia is gonna want all the details
Tell her Kiwi was very brave. Well, mostly 😊
hahaha will do
shes already back to chirping and being dramatic
Sounds about right. Love you sweetheart. Give Kiwi a treat for being brave ❤️
love u too mom
Hey honey! Mia is coloring at the kitchen table right now, being so good 😇 What are you up to this weekend?
aww thats cute
quiet weekend tbh. just gonna chill with kiwi
That sounds nice sweetheart. You deserve some down time. Are you eating real food or just snacking?
lol mom im eating fine i promise
made pasta last night actually
Good. I worry about you when you're by yourself all weekend. I'm making chili tonight, Mia already requested the bean one 😊
lol she loves ur chili
she talks about it all the time
Have you started your Christmas shopping yet? It's getting close!
yeah got most of it done online
few packages coming this week
Oh good, you're more organized than me. I still need to find something for your aunt linda. Any ideas?
maybe a nice candle set? she always has candles going
That's a great idea! I'll look tomorrow.
Mia just asked if Kiwi misses her 😂 She wants me to tell you to give Kiwi a kiss
hahaha kiwi is screaming at the tv rn so yeah she definately misses her little human
That bird 😂 Okay honey I'm gonna get Mia in the bath soon. Enjoy your quiet night. Love you ❤️
love you too mom ❤️ give mia a big hug from me
Always do. She sends one right back 😘 Get some sleep tonight okay?
Morning honey. I'll pick up Mia from daycare at 5 today. Does she need anything for the weekend?
morning! nope shes all set. slept great last night, heading out for a run 🏃‍♀️
Glad to hear it sweetheart. Make sure you eat something before you go. Love you ❤️
love u too mom 😊
hey mom, so whats the plan for christmas
Well I was thinking dinner at my place on the 25th. I'll do all the cooking. You and Mia come over around 3?
yes perfect
I'm making the ham and your grandmother's sweet potato casserole. And Mia's mac and cheese of course ☺️
omg yes she will be so happy
u need me to bring anything?
Maybe a pie? I've got everything else covered.
ya ill grab one from publix
Sweet potato or pecan?
why not both lol
That's my girl ❤️ Is Jordan doing anything with Mia for the holiday?
ya hes gonna pick her up the 27th for a few hours
Good. She should see her daddy during the holidays.
ya she keeps talking about it
I'm so excited honey. I got her something special this year. She is going to SCREAM.
hahaha mom u spoil her
That's my job. Can't wait to see my girls on Christmas. Love you sweetheart ❤️
love u too mom ❤️
hey mom mia settle in ok?
She’s wonderful! We’re making cookies right now. She has flour in her hair 😊
hahaha pics or it didnt happen
Here she is, my little chef!
omg 😂😂
so random but my kitchen faucet has been leaking
Oh no. How bad? Just dripping or actually running?
steady drip, getting worse the last few days
put in a maintenance request tonight
Good. Have you checked under the sink? There should be a shutoff valve. Turn it clockwise to slow the water down until they get there.
ooh good call lemme check
ok found it and turned it partway. drip slowed way down
ur a genius
See, I’m still useful for something 😊 When are they coming to fix it?
friday afternoon between 1 and 3
At least you’ll be working from home. Put some old towels down in case it gets messy.
ya good idea thx mom
Of course honey. Mia says goodnight by the way! She just ate two cookies and is very proud of herself ❤️
tell her goodnight from mama 💕 love u guys
Love you too sweetheart. Get some rest tonight ❤️
Mia was SO good this weekend honey. She helped me water the garden and didn't even complain about getting dirty 😊
omg thats adorable 😭 shes growing up so fast
She really is. Making her favorite tomorrow, mac and cheese with the breadcrumbs on top. Love you sweetheart ❤️
love u too mom
Picking up little bug now. Everything good your way?
yeah all good! give her a big hug from me
Always do. She's already talking about what game she wants to play when we get home. Love you ❤️
Hey sweetheart. Just checking in on things. Is Jordan stepping up these days? I worry about you handling everything on your own.
yeah he's been good about pickups lately 🙂 mia had a great time saturday
That's good to hear honey. She told me all about the park. As long as he's doing his part ❤️
he is! dont worry mom 😊
I'm your mother, worrying is literally my job. Love you sweetheart.
lol love u too
sooo ive been thinking about mias birthday
Oh honey I was just thinking about that too! My little bug is turning FIVE. Where does the time go 😭
i know!! so i was thinking maybe a bounce house place
She would absolutely love that. Have you looked at any places yet?
ya theres skyzone in atlanta they do birthday packages
How much would that run?
like $290 for up to 15 kids
That's not bad at all. Let me help pay for it.
mom u dont have to
Hush. It's my grandbaby's 5th birthday. I'm helping and that's final ❤️
lol ok fine. so for the guest list im thinking her preschool friends
Definitely the preschool kids. How many total are you thinking?
probably 12-15? ill email the little acorns parents
That sounds perfect. And I'll handle the cake. She's still rainbow-everything I assume?
obviously lol
Of course she is 😂 I know just the place. This is going to be so special honey. Love you
love u too ❤️
omg mom mias school is doing a spring showcase
april 11th
her whole class is singing songs lol shes been practicing at home
Oh how exciting! What time honey?
10am doors open at 930
I'll be there with bells on. Wouldn't miss it ❤️
yay ok ill fwd u the email
Is Jordan coming?
prob not its not his weekend
Ok. Does she need a special outfit?
yeah spring colors. gonna grab her something from target friday
I saw the cutest little sundresses there last week. Want me to pick one up?
thx mom but i wanna take her to pick it out
That's sweet. She's going to be precious up there. I just know I'm going to be a mess 😭
lol ur definitely gonna cry
And I'm not sorry about it. My sweet girl on stage. Love you honey
love u mom ❤️
hey so party is this sunday! are we good on the cake?
Yes ma'am! Ordered a rainbow cake from Sweet Hut Bakery. Picking it up Sunday morning at 10.
omg she is going to LOSE it
It has a little unicorn on top too. I couldn't help myself 😊
lolll ur the best
How many kids RSVPed?
13 plus mia so 14. few parents staying too
Good. I'll grab juice boxes and fruit trays from Publix on Saturday.
mom i can get the food stuff
Already on my list honey. You just focus on having fun with her ❤️
ok ok thank u 🙏
Can't believe my little bug is going to be five. Love you sweetheart
love u too mom 😭
sooo ur birthday is next saturday
we need to do something
omggg yes pls
i was literally abt to text u abt this
brunch?
YES
flying biscuit??
STOPPP thats perfect 😍
i havent been in so long
ok ill make a res
10am?
lol u know i dont do mornings on saturdays
girl its brunch
the whole point is morning
ok fine lmao 10 works
ill invite keisha and danielle too?
yesss
danielle owes me a drink btw 😂
lmaoo noted
ok ill make the res and text them
ur the best babe 💕
i know 😌
ok i cant stop looking at this necklace 😭
lol u already cried at thr table
I DID NOT
ok maybe a little
a little 😂
its just so pretty
the T charm 🥺
glad u like it
like it?? i LOVE it
ok send me all thr pics from brunch
one sec
omggg we look so good
im posting tht first one rn
wait send me the one danielle took
ok yeah thats the one
best birthday brunch ever 💕✨
thank u so much for planning all of this
happy birthday girl love u ❤️
love u more 😭💕
ok so
keishas having a nye party at her place 🎉🎉
u HAVE to come
omg when
the 31st obvi lol starts at like 9
shes getting a dj and evrything
ooh that sounds fun
its gonna be so good girl
i already told her ur coming lol
lmao ok i gotta figure out mia but ya im down
denise has her right??
ya lemme check
ok ya shes at my moms that night so im good
YESSS
ok outfit planning starts now 💅✨
lol we have 3 days
exactly. no time to waste
hey so dont hate me
uh oh
im coming down with something 🤒
i feel awful but i dont think i can make it tonight
noooo 😭
r u ok??
ya just like achy and tired. think its a cold or something
ugh thats the worst timing
i know im so sorry
dont apologize babe just rest
want me to bring u soup tmrw?
lol ur sweet. ill be fine just need to sleep it off
ok but if u change ur mind im still here
thanks tash ❤️
love u feel better 💕
love u too. happy new year
happy new year 🎆 now go rest!!
LOOK AT THIS ONE 😍🏠
zillow.com/homedetails/kirkwood-bungalow-329k
3 bed in kirkwood girl
omg thats cute
right?? the kitchen tho 👀
i love kirkwood

east atlanta too ur so close to everything

im emailing u thr full listing its SO good

zillow.com/homedetails/reynoldstown-condo-275k
reynoldstown. under 300. 2 bed
ok that is really cute ngl
sooo when r u scheduling tours 👀
ugh market's so crazy rn, gonna wait for rates to drop 😩
girl rates have been 'about to drop' for like 2 yrs lol
i know i know
just dont wanna see u miss out babe
ya ur right. just trying to be smart abt timing u know
ok fair. but im saving all these for u 🏠
lol i appreciate u fr
doing habitat for humanity tmrw, gonna be sore af
wait what
habitat for humanity??
yeah lol signed up for a build day
omggg thats actually so cool
where is it
some site off stanton rd i think? sw atl
ur gonna be lifting stuff all day?? with ur hands?? 😬
its fine ill wear gloves lol
not like nonstop hammering they have different stations
ok just be careful fr
i will mom 🙄
lmaooo ok take pics tho i wanna see 📸
bet
ok im dead
lmaooo how was it
so fun tho we framed like half a wall
met some cool ppl too
look at u out here being a good person 😭✨
lol shut up
no fr thats awesome
yeah might sign up for thr next one in march
ur literally out here building houses while i binged love is blind all day 💀
hahaha did u finish it
obviously
ok but ur arms r gonna be so sore tmrw
already sore
taking the longest bath of my life rn
u deserve it 👑
lol thx
ok so i need ur help with something
ooh what 👀
mias bday party is april 19th at skyzone
WAIT
shes gonna be FIVE??? 😭😭
i know 😭
ok what do u need
decorations lol. banners balloons all that
say less im the decoration queen 👑
lol thats literally why im asking u
whats the theme
rainbow unicorn obvi
of COURSE she does 😂✨
im already on amazon
ur amazing. budget like 40-50?
easy. ill grab evrything and bring it day of
tysm 🙏
anything for my favorite tiny human ❤️
TASHA
shes up there singing her lil heart out im done
STOPPP 😭😭
im literally crying at my desk rn
she looks SO cute omg the dress
my mom is already bawling lol
AS SHE SHOULD
that dress is adorable where did u get it
target lol
of course 😂
ur raising thr cutest kid alive babe for real
ty 🥹 she was so nervous this morning but she absolutley nailed it
im so proud of her give her a hug from auntie tasha
will do 🥰

she has new christmas stuff so shell prob want to bring a bag lol
noon
ok bring her back by 5?
ya
she wants to show u her magna tiles btw
cool
merry christmas
u too

10 like always

leaving now

ok shes ready. bring her jacket back this time pls
ya
heading back

been tight. end of month
ok
outside
coming down
hey whens the deposit coming
omw
k shes ready
next week

I said ill handle it
dropping off in 5
ok
she had fun thx for taking her to the park
hey! r u doing the little acorns thanksgiving feast on tuesday? mia and zoe could sit together
yes!! mia is so excited. i signed up for the green bean dish lol pray for me
girl same i drew dessert and im just bringing 2 boxes of nilla wafers 😂
honestly perfect
is mia ok? zoe said she was crying at pickup
ya she got pushed in the block area, no big deal. she's fine now eating goldfish on the couch
ugh sorry. kids are wild. tell her zoe says hi
playdate this weekend? we could do the inman park playground if it doesnt rain
yes please she's been climbing the furniture all week i need to drain her battery
perfect. sat 10am? ill bring snacks
is mia going to the spring showcase saturday? zoe is in the bumblebee class doing the song
yes!!! mia has been singing it on loop for two weeks. denise + i are both coming
sweet save us seats. starts at 10 right
ya 10 sharp
ok mia bday party is when?? we might be in destin that weekend, dont want to miss it
april 19, sunday, 2pm. we rock the spectrum. invite is going out this week
we'll be back!! we wouldnt miss it. zoe will lose her mind
best party ever zoe is passed out in the car
thank u for coming. mia keeps saying 'zoe is my best friend' — she is wrecked too
u up? frostbyte is being weird about the raid time again
ya. what now
wants to push it to 1am bc 'optimal team comp' lmao. its a tuesday
tell him no. i have a kid
lol thats my line. ok 11:30 it is
u in tonight? new dungeon dropped
ya gimme 30 min, getting mia down
girl. i finally finished that react course u recommended
WAIT no way. how was it
good actually. the hooks section was rough but i get it now. u want to do a study group on weekends?
yes pls. saturday mornings before mia wakes up?
im in. coffee + pair coding
ok new lobby member novamoon is way too good. like sus levels of good
lol probably has played for 10 yrs
yeah but its annoying when ur trying to learn the boss
u see the sarah chen email yet
ya she wants to schedule a phone screen for next week
do it!! u r ready. mosaic is a good shop, my friend works on their backend
k. nervous but doing it. dont tell anyone obv
lock and key 🔒
how did it go
phone screen went well i think. they want me back for an onsite
RACHEL. proud of u. when
april 22. notion is open for prep tonight
still on for sat 7am piedmont loop?
yes. weather looks good. 7am 14th st gate
u going to power yoga sunday at sweat? im trying to beat my brunch hangover
lol yes. 10am hot flow. heated tho fyi
i need to be cooked
rough day yesterday — i saw u were on the eastside trail at like 5am wtf
ya needed to clear my head. didnt sleep great
u good?
ya. arthritis flare + work stuff. nothing dramatic
ok lmk if u need anything. coffee soon?
🙏 yes lets do octane next week
10k registration opens monday — beltline trail race in april. teaming up?
im in. that gives me 8 weeks to actually train
lmao 'actually train' u literally run 4 days a week
those r recovery jogs. this needs Real Workouts
ok type-a. we can do tempo runs sunday mornings
tempo this morning? 8am beltline?
ya. mia is at jordans, i can do longer if u want
8 mi at half marathon pace?
lets do it 💪
race is in 2 weeks. last long run sunday?
yes. 10mi at easy pace, no hero stuff
deal. carbs after at home grown
